_README: OPTIMISTIC critical-path plan for the NR4A3 PROTAC-degrader paper (ChemRxiv preprint + JCIM).
This file is the SINGLE MACHINE SOURCE the daily status email projects into a day-by-day calendar.
HUMAN-READABLE MASTER (read this for the full rationale, GO/NO-GO gates + 'what's next'):
STRATEGY.md. Milestone `id`s here match the stage tags in that master plan.
Keep the two in sync: when work lands, update each milestone's `status` and, for an in-progress item,
`remaining_days`. `status`: done | in_progress | pending. `track`: gpu | cpu | write | submit.
`parallel_ok`: true = may overlap other legs up to the 8-wide spot quota. `cost_est_usd`: est. SPOT $ for
THAT step (honest range; pin tighter from realized GPU-h before launch).
2026-07-15 (trimcrae, after the reviewer verdict): SPEND-GATED LADDER + NO PRE-AUTHORIZATION.
(a) NOTHING is pre-authorized or staged to auto-launch. EVERY gpu run is presented at its gate with the
prior result + a pinned cost estimate, and waits for an explicit trimcrae 'go'. Only $0 CPU/CI runs
without a nod.
(b) The order is CHEAPEST-DECISIVE-FIRST: the cheapest run that could KILL the paper runs first, and each
rung's bigger spend is unlocked ONLY if the previous cheaper rung's result looks promising. We can kill
a non-viable paper for ~$25 (valA_mini) and never reach the ~$150-400 flagship matrix until four cheaper
gates have each said GO. See the master plan's Spend summary + GO/NO-GO tests.
RUNGS: 0 free/running (step0, emc_e3, pocket_reanalysis) -> 1 valA_mini (kill-switch) -> 2 step1_pilot +
valB_mini (all-binding graded edge) -> 3 valB_full CUBE + nrv04_feasibility -> 4 step1_fanout +
nr4a_differential_atlas($0) + nrv04_retrospective -> 5 ORIENTATION-FIRST LADDER: orientation_basin_search ->
selectivity_wedge_confirm (*** CAUSAL KILL-SWITCH: no confirmed NR4A3 wedge => STOP + publish negative) ->
inverse_linker_design($0) -> ternary_ensemble_refine -> local_ternary_fep -> 6 fold/redteam/post.
OPTIONAL/HELD: dg_open, abfe_conditional.
2026-07-24 RESTRUCTURING: RUNG 5 fixed {warhead x exit x ligase x linker} matrix REPLACED by an
orientation-first inverse-design ladder with a causal kill-switch (reciprocal alchemical mutation cycles).
Prices re-based on MEASURED Vast 3090 endpoint-MD (~$0.4-0.7/6ns leg) + Vast 4090 alchemical
(~$12-20/RBFE edge; ~$65-110/3-replica ternary cooperativity edge, est.). Full-go ~$1.2k mid; kill-switch
NO-GO stop ~$725 with a publishable causal negative. STRATEGY.md is the authoritative source; this mirrors it.
The reviewer's 5 mandatory changes (verbatim: nr4a3-degrader-reviewer-revisions-2026-07-15.md):
(1) separate ACCURACY (public measured-ddG benchmark) vs PRECISION (cmpd19 = conditional hypotheses, no
pose) vs TERNARY known-answer control (VHL-BRD4/SMARCA2); NR-V04 -> biological HOLDOUT, not calibrator.
(2) cryptic-pocket affinities are CONDITIONAL (dG_bind|open); dG_open differs per paralogue -> part of
selectivity. Estimate dG_open per paralogue OR report conditional. Delete 'true binding likely stronger'.
(3) ABFE HELD/reframed: T4L is a smoke test not a transferable offset; report RAW; not proof of binding.
(4) NR-V04 celastrol is COVALENT (C551) -> covalent adduct + C551A + noncov/cov sensitivity + recruiter
controls; report DIRECTIONAL CONCORDANCE, never 'recovered degradation'.
(5) prospective matrix = staged gates + PARETO (not a tunable scalar); model EWSR1::NR4A3 fusion context +
lysines beyond the LBD + full CRL/E2~Ub ensembles; 24-36 before controls -> preregistered downselect.
LANGUAGE: 'predicted selective candidate'; never imply efficacy/safety/therapeutic-window/clinical-readiness;
cmpd19 MYC induction is a LIABILITY, not benefit.
2026-07-24 (CORRECTED Vast economics; supersedes a 2026-07-23 note): TWO findings. (1) CARD DECISION (measured,
solid): gpu_md_bench 4090=1549/669/175.6 vs 3090=72.5 ns/day at 35k/85k/444k -> the 4090 wins $/ns at EVERY
size INCLUDING the 466k covalent panel (2.42x the 3090, ~9% more/hr), refuting the a-priori 3090-for-covalent
pick (single-host-per-point; confirm before moving a large panel). (2) RETRACTION: a 2026-07-23 note claimed
the whole program is ~$80-200 on Vast 4090 by scaling PLAIN-MD bench throughput by ~1.7x. THAT WAS WRONG -
alchemical HREX is ~tens x slower per ns than plain MD (12 coupled windows/1 GPU + softcore + multistate
evals). The firm RBFE run (reduced leg ran ~2h without finishing) CONFIRMS the pilot-billing anchor ~55 GPU-h
/RBFE complex leg. Price alchemical stages on PILOT BILLING, never the bench $/ns: RBFE edge ~$12-20, ternary
3-replica edge ~$65-110 (146,509-particle system, firm-run confirmed); step1_fanout(19) ~$230-380. DO NOT
quote a single whole-program total (neither the retracted ~$200 nor a naive $840/2-3x): the provider is ~2-3x
cheaper/GPU-h (down) BUT the real per-edge GPU-h is ~5-15x what the $840 schedule assumed (up, so $840 was
itself an underestimate) - they roughly cancel to an unknown dominated by the unpinned ternary matrix count.
Price bottom-up per edge; gate each rung individually.
Authoritative detail in STRATEGY.md -> GPU/PROVIDER SELECTION economics block. cost_est_usd fields below left
as-is (AWS/GCP range) pending a real alchemical-on-Vast per-edge measurement.
spend_policy: NO pre-authorization. Every GPU run waits for an explicit go at its gate with a pinned cost. Cheapest-decisive-first: never spend an expensive rung unless the previous cheaper rung's result is promising.

milestones.title: RUNG 0: get RBFE running on OpenFE + managed-spot GPU (infra shakeout - NOT science yet)
milestones.note: DONE 2026-07-16 (PASSED, GO). One OpenFE RBFE edge (shared solvent morph denovo_401->lo_m0_NCCO_gen) ran end-to-end via the spot-safe split (setup CPU -> simulate GPU-spot RBFE_SPOT_SAFE=1 -> analyze MBAR); converged dG_morph = -48.75 +/- 0.57 kcal/mol. Confirmed am1bcc charging works on real hardware AND the spot-safe warmup->production->commit/restore driver (main f5f9bbb) is GPU-validated on our real edge (live S3 commits seen in production). Realized ~$1-2 spot. HISTORICAL: Driving OpenFE RBFE on a managed-spot instance (edge 401->lo_m0_NCCO). Re-dispatched ~7x on 2026-07-15 while fixing an ExecuteUserScriptError. Prerequisite for ALL science. CHARGE-MODEL FIX (2026-07-15, free engineering): root-caused the earlier am1bcc failure = the RBFE conda env shipped WITHOUT ambertools; added ambertools>=23 + set partial_charge_method='am1bcc' (CHARGE_METHOD=nagl fallback). The NEXT shakeout uses am1bcc and confirms CPU charging succeeds (~$0 marginal); this puts us on the documented reference method so we can CITE OpenFE's validation and cut Val A to a near-free smoke. GO/NO-GO: one edge completes end-to-end with a sane dG -> proceed; if it can't run at all -> FEP program blocked, reconsider tooling. Also gives us the realized GPU-h/edge to pin every downstream cost.

milestones.title: RUNG 0 (free): public EMC VHL/CRBN expression analysis (informs ligase choice)
milestones.result: DONE 2026-07-23 (HPA via CI run 30038257256, nr4a-e3-expression.json). All 10 components of BOTH arms 'Detected in all' tissues -> both CRL2^VHL (VHL/ELOB/ELOC/CUL2/RBX1) and CRL4^CRBN (CRBN/DDB1/CUL4A/B/RBX1) broadly expressed => VHL-vs-CRBN choice NOT constrained by machinery availability; decide on ternary/geometry/selectivity grounds. Honest limit: no EMC line in HPA -> general soft-tissue/mesenchymal availability, not EMC-specific.
milestones.note: Mandatory-change-5 support. 2026-07-23: extended nr4a3_e3_expression.py from CRBN-only to BOTH recruiter arms (CRL2^VHL: VHL+ELOB+ELOC+CUL2+RBX1; CRL4^CRBN: CRBN+DDB1+CUL4A/B+RBX1) so it actually informs the VHL-vs-CRBN choice; emits a per-arm broad-expression verdict. Ran via CI (depmap-dependency.yml, HPA egress-blocked from sandbox) -> nr4a-e3-expression.json. Honest limit: no EMC line in HPA, so this is machinery-availability across general soft-tissue/mesenchymal tissue, not EMC-specific. Free CPU, done without a nod.

milestones.title: RUNG 0 (free): harmonized pocket-tracking re-analysis (finalize Gate 2 druggability wording)
milestones.note: DONE 2026-07-23. Harmonized consolidated detection (nr4a3-pocket-reharmonize-summary.json; pinned fpocket + score-independent matcher rerun, jobs 2026-07-10) folded into the paper Gate-2 wording (Sec 2.1). Both 'await harmonized' placeholders replaced with actual both-denominator numbers: 8XTT 19/20 detected, 3 >= D*=0.53 (was 4/20 pre-harmonized -> 3/19 among detected, 3/20 across all deposited); release bias-free continuations druggable in 56/40/80% of frames per replica, 44/75=59% pooled. Cheap CPU; done without a nod.

milestones.title: RUNG 1: reference-reproduction smoke + CITE OpenFE (reduced from a paid benchmark by the am1bcc fix)
milestones.result: PASS/GO 2026-07-17 (GCP L4 CUDA, spot-safe, run 29566859637). TYK2 ejm31->ejm42, full 5ns x 12-window RBFE both legs: ddg_bind=+0.366 vs ddg_exp=-0.24 kcal/mol -> abs_err=0.606 < 2.0 GO-tol => GO. Our OpenFE container reproduces a known ddG, so the build is sound (kill-switch cleared). Solvent leg ddG=13.703+/-0.079. Result in gs://.../valA-tyk2/results/ddg_nr4a3.json. Ran on GCP to burn $300 credits; survived ~9 spot preemptions purely via the GCS checkpoint/resume path (validated end-to-end).
milestones.note: Mandatory change 1A, REDUCED. The RUNG-0 charge-model fix (added ambertools>=23 to environment-rbfe.yml; partial_charge_method='am1bcc') put us on the STANDARD documented method, so am1bcc is what OpenFE's published ~1.7 kcal/mol benchmark rests on - we CITE that and only run a minimal 1-2 public known-answer edge to confirm OUR container build reproduces a known ddG (charging verify is CPU/$0; confirming MD edge ~$5-15). Does NOT touch NR4A - build-consistency check. GO/NO-GO: 1-2 edges land near known ddG -> build sound, GO. Off -> real container bug, fix before spending. FALLBACK: if am1bcc charging ever fails on a specific ligand, set CHARGE_METHOD=nagl and Val A reverts to the paid ~$25 NAGL-validation benchmark. NOT pre-authorized - presented with a pinned cost after step 0.

milestones.title: RUNG 2: cmpd19 CONDITIONAL relative FE, 1-2 edges + replicas + pose/state sensitivity

result_first_edge.engine: OpenFE RelativeHybridTopologyProtocol, 12 lambda-windows HREX, MBAR; Modal L4 GPU, spot-safe GCS checkpoint/resume
result_first_edge.interpretation: 5-NH2 analogue predicted ~1.8 kcal/mol (~20x) WEAKER than cmpd19 in the modeled opened pocket. Both legs MBAR-converged (tight within-run SE). Single edge / single replicate / single opened-conformer.
result_first_edge.meaning: Proves the congeneric-RBFE pipeline works end-to-end and CONVERGES on the real NR4A3 system (the plumbing half of the gate). CONDITIONAL relative FE on a HYPOTHESIZED cmpd19 pose (no solved structure, no measured affinity) -> statistical convergence + self-consistency, NOT experimental-accuracy (that is valA, the separate public benchmark).
result_first_edge.crux_cleared: The pilot's pre-registered crux (can a congeneric RBFE converge on this cryptic pocket without the pocket collapsing?) is CLEARED on this edge -> box checked/done.
result_first_edge.carried_to_fanout: replicas (reproducibility) + pose/state sensitivity (receptor-sensitivity) sweep are inputs to the RUNG-4 fan-out (refine per-edge n_windows/GPU-h + the conditional caveat); they do NOT reopen this pilot. Fan-out still independently requires valA_full.

milestones.note: Mandatory change 1B. Only if Rung 1 = GO. Conditional relative FE for a HYPOTHESIZED cmpd19 mode in preselected open conformers; tests reproducibility + receptor-sensitivity, NOT pose correctness. GO/NO-GO: reproducible, receptor-sensitive, pocket doesn't collapse -> GO; pathological -> anchor too fragile, reconsider before fan-out. FIRST EDGE RAN 2026-07-18 (see result_first_edge): ddG_bind=+1.84 kcal/mol, converged, pocket stable -> pilot crux CLEARED, DONE. Replicas + pose/state sensitivity carried to the fan-out (do not reopen this pilot); fan-out still gated on valA_full.

milestones.title: RUNG 2: known-answer ternary edge Wurz cmpd1 -> cmpd4 (SMARCA2-VHL, 8G1Q; ddG_coop_exp=+0.94, alpha_SPR)
milestones.note: Mandatory change 1C. REDESIGNED TWICE on 2026-07-17 (research/manuscripts/valB-reviewer-decision-2026-07-17.md). (a) The original hi->lo panel edge (P1->P5) is NOT congeneric; a wide RCSB search found no clean same-assay congeneric both-alpha edge. (b) The first substitute PROTAC 2 -> cis-PROTAC 2 (epimer) was RETIRED by the reviewer (Option-1 GO): a pure single-stereocenter inversion is a NULL alchemical transformation under the production complete single-topology map (identical FF params, 124/124 atoms mapped -> ddG ~ 0 by construction; verified by an endpoint-verification smoke) and needs a bespoke partial/dummy map that is NOT the production protocol. APPROVED replacement = Wurz et al. (Nat Commun 2023) SMARCA2-VHL compound 1 -> compound 4: same-paper SPR alpha 12.8 -> 2.6, a GENUINE constitutional edge (minimal linker pyridine->benzene = ring N->CH), preregistered ddG_coop_exp = -RT ln(2.6/12.8) = +0.94 kcal/mol. Staged from PDB 8G1Q (3.73 A SMARCA4-cmpd1-VHL; NOT a SMARCA2 crystal) with a mandated SMARCA4->SMARCA2 BD substitution + >=2 relaxed models + divergence check. Built + CPU-validated: wurz-calib-frozen.json, wurz_calib_freeze.py, resolver (resolved_calib_wurz), smarca2_model.py (SMARCA4->SMARCA2), ternary_pdb_stage.py assembly, 5-part $0 smoke gate (nr4a3_ternary_fep._five_part_gate), null-map guard + regression test (tests/test_null_map_guard.py). $0 PRE-SPEND GATE (GPU only when the smoke records all 5): (1) chemical identity built==published + not graph-identical after stereo removal; (2) non-null map (linker N->C, no unintended stereocenter change); (3) same atom map + E3 construct in binary & ternary; (4) 8G1Q SMARCA4->SMARCA2 relax >=2 models divergence_ok; (5) alpha_SPR label + +0.94 + SMARCA2-model limitation. DECISION RULE (the +-1.0 kcal/mol band is REMOVED; separation<1 kcal/mol makes a noisy positive point estimate INDETERMINATE): PASS requires positive sign + CI excludes zero + no fwd/rev disagreement + no collapse/escape/restraint-dominated + broad consistency with +0.94. valB_mini GATES valB_full only; NR4A ternary scores stay EXPLORATORY until valB_full passes.

milestones.title: RUNG 3: expand public RBFE accuracy benchmark to 10-20 edges (publishable size)
milestones.result: SKIPPED 2026-07-18. Skip condition met: valA_mini reproduced the known TYK2 ddG cleanly (abs_err 0.61 < 2.0) on the STANDARD am1bcc method (post RUNG-0 charge fix), NOT the NAGL surrogate. valA_full's only purpose was to characterize/repair a NAGL-introduced discrepancy, which no longer exists -> a full 10-20 edge re-derivation is redundant with OpenFE's published ~1.7 kcal/mol benchmark for this exact reference protocol. Paper cites OpenFE for accuracy; valA_mini stands as a single-edge build-consistency confirmation (NOT a standalone accuracy benchmark). RE-OPEN only if am1bcc charging is later forced onto NAGL (CHARGE_METHOD=nagl) for some ligand.
milestones.note: Mandatory change 1A (full). SKIPPED - see result. Original GO/NO-GO if run: RMSE in a defensible band (~<=2 kcal/mol, comparable to OpenFE public ~1.7) -> GO. step1_fanout's Val-A accuracy gate is now satisfied by 'cite OpenFE + clean valA_mini' rather than by running valA_full.

milestones.title: RUNG 3: Val B component-calibration CUBE (module-specific; no single 'validated' verdict)
milestones.cost_est_usd: 120-350 (Vast 4090 alchemical edges dominate + 3090 ubiquitination-geometry MD; was 80-200 as a single AWS-priced series)
milestones.note: Mandatory change 1C + 2026-07-24 restructuring. Only if valB_mini = GO. Four separately-calibrated MODULES, each with its own uncertainty model + pass/fail (a failed module -> qualitative-only; NO blanket 'ternary pipeline validated'): (1) all-binding graded cooperativity [already run as valB-mini Wurz 1->4; add >=1 more graded edge for coverage; Vast 4090 ~$65-110/edge]; (2) ternary pose recovery [generator includes the known orientation in top-k with calibrated confidence; co-fold/CI ~$0]; (3) paralogue discrimination [same degrader across close paralogues on a public system with a known differential - the direct analogue of the NR4A ask; 4090 ~$65-110]; (4) productive-vs-unproductive ubiquitination geometry [full-CRL model separates ternary occupancy from Ub-transfer competence on a public system with mapped lysines; 3090 MD ~$10-40]. Plus the cis-epimer negative-endpoint STRESS module (demoted from valB-mini; a pass forced by artificially holding the active pose is not a pass). GATE: the prospective ladder never runs unless the cooperativity + paralogue-discrimination modules pass (calibrated intervals, correct direction on held-out observations).

milestones.title: RUNG 3: NR-V04 covalent (C551) feasibility + reduced control panel
milestones.cost_est_usd: MEASURED ~$0.37-0.71/leg (mean ~$0.6, 6 legs) -> ~$10-11/panel (was est 40-100 -> ~an order of magnitude overestimate)
milestones.cost_measured: RTX 3090 on Vast, interruptible bid min_bid x1.5 (raised from x1.1 for preemption-hold), billed on dph_total ~$0.10-0.16/hr (host storage/inet spread drives per-leg cost, not the bid). 6 ns/leg (1 ns equil + 5 ns prod), ~466k atoms, ~40-61 ns/day, ~2 h production. 6 completed legs (2026-07-23) span $0.37-0.71/leg (mean ~$0.6, S3-persisted ledger firming toward the higher end as pricier hosts finish) -> ~$10-11 for the 18-leg panel. Pipeline proven end-to-end (no blow-ups; R1 stable + R2 recruited on completed legs). Real Vast infra fixed to complete this (all merged, root-caused from instance logs): PTX host filter cuda_max_good>=13.0 (env PTX is CUDA-13-class -> old-driver hosts crashed at build_system), 429-throttled teardown, S3 price ledger, idempotent skip-only-alive re-dispatch, auto-stop reap of terminal/duplicate instances, x1.5 preemption-hold bid.
milestones.note: Mandatory change 4. Covalent celastrol-NR4A1 (C551) adduct + noncov/cov sensitivity + C551A control + warhead-only/recruiter controls. GO/NO-GO: covalency doesn't swamp the signal and the reduced panel behaves -> GO to the full NR-V04 retrospective. LAUNCHED 2026-07-23 on Vast with the SVD/blow-up finite-guard fix (covalent-pull strain -> NaN was crashing every prior attempt).

milestones.title: RUNG 4: cmpd19 congeneric map, 8-wide (conditional hypotheses + sensitivity ranges)
milestones.cost_est_usd: 50-140 (Vast 4090 alchemical RBFE ~$12-20/edge; produces the warhead+exit-vector inputs the inverse linker design consumes)
milestones.note: GATE: Val A accuracy satisfied (valA_full SKIPPED - valA_mini clean on am1bcc -> cite OpenFE) AND the Step 1 pilot behaved. Full congeneric map across druggable 8XTT conformers, release-derived NR4A3 conformers, matched NR4A1/NR4A2 open conformers, resolved microstates. Rank by worst conformer AND receptor>conformer, as CONDITIONAL hypotheses with sensitivity ranges (no synthetic ensemble affinity).

milestones.title: RUNG 4: NR-V04 retrospective - preregistered biological holdout (directional concordance)
milestones.cost_est_usd: 60-150 (Vast 3090 MD bulk @ ~$0.4-0.7/leg + a few 4090 FEP/ubiquitination legs; revised down from 80-200 on measured 3090 economics)
milestones.note: Full NR4A1/2/3 ensembles through the physics + ubiquitination pipeline, NO tuning, preregistered scoring (fixed on Val B-full), VHL-inactive epimer negative control. Report DIRECTIONAL CONCORDANCE/DISCORDANCE - NEVER 'recovered degradation'. GO/NO-GO: at least directionally concordant with NR4A1-degraded / NR4A2.NR4A3-spared -> GO to the matrix. Discordant -> matrix NOT justified; publish the honest negative.

milestones.title: RUNG 4 (mostly free): NR4A1/2/3 paralogue-differential surface atlas + lysine-accessibility map
milestones.result: DONE 2026-07-24, $0 in-sandbox CPU. nr4a_differential_atlas.py (pure-stdlib Shrake-Rupley SASA + affine-gap BLOSUM62 alignment + character-change typing) over matched results/nr4a3-matrix/nr4a{3,1,2}-opened.pdb -> nr4a3-differential-surface-atlas.json + .md + 6 passing unit tests. VALIDATED: reproduces canonical nr4a-selectivity.json on 148/148 known residues (0 mismatch). RESULT: 254 residues, 137 exposed, 109 divergent (42.9%), 46 differential-surface handles (exposed x divergent x character-changing; 33 vs both), 15/15 LBD lysines exposed. Top: U576 L->(G/N), U574 Q->(V/G), U412 R->(A/T charge-lost-both), U413 D->(K/S charge-reversed). GATE: PASS/GO - a differential surface exists to steer an E3 against; RUNG-5a orientation-basin search warranted. Optional add-on open: matched NR4A1/2 MD ensembles (~$10-40 Vast 3090) for dynamics robustness.
milestones.cost_est_usd: 0-40 (analysis $0 CPU DONE; optional matched NR4A1/2 LBD MD ensembles ~$10-40 on Vast 3090 @ ~$0.4-0.7/6ns leg)
milestones.note: 2026-07-24 orientation-first restructuring. Matched NR4A1/2/3 receptor ensembles (identical frames/microstates/transforms/sampling) -> paralogue-differential surface + electrostatic/H-bond map; fusion-context scenarios; SEPARATE LBD/hinge/DBD/fusion lysine map; warhead-pose sensitivity. Output = a discrimination MAP, not three receptor models. FREE CPU analysis -> will build+run without a spend nod; itself a cheap early NO-GO. GATE: >=1 exposed paralogue difference reachable by a recruited VHL/CRBN, else the wedge search is unlikely to succeed.

milestones.title: RUNG 5a: orientation-space search for NR4A3-selective E3-placement basins (before linkers)
milestones.cost_est_usd: 0-50 (CPU sampling/clustering $0; optional Vast-3090 MM-GBSA rescore of basin reps ~$30-50)
milestones.note: 2026-07-24 restructuring. Broad VHL/CRBN transform sampling (flexible linker-reach restraint); matched 3-paralogue interface scoring; cluster into ~3-8 basins/ligase; cheap counterfactual residue screen to NOMINATE wedges. Cheap scoring NOMINATES only; the go/no-go is the alchemical mutation-cycle confirm (selectivity_wedge_confirm), NOT these coarse scores (poor S/N for small paralogue differences).

milestones.title: RUNG 5a-KS: pilot-first wedge KILL-SWITCH (cheap gate) + reciprocal mutation cycle (causal result)
milestones.cost_est_usd: DECISION ~$40-90 (pilot ONE direction 3->1); full reciprocal cycle ~$100-350 (causal result, ONLY if pilot passes) - est. Vast 4090, PIN with first Vast ternary edge
milestones.note: 2026-07-24 restructuring, PILOT-FIRST (corrects an earlier framing that mislabeled the full ~$100-350 cycle as 'the kill-switch' - a $350 gate on a $500 tail is poor economics). TIERED cheap-decisive-first gate: Tier1 atlas ($0) -> Tier2 basin nomination ($0-50) -> Tier3 pilot ONE alchemical mutation leg 3->1 (~$40-90, repo pilot-one-leg rule). ddG_neo-interface = dG_mut^ternary - dG_mut^binary. CHEAP GO/NO-GO: no interface loss on the pilot -> STOP (whole decision ~$40-140 marginal); publish honest causal negative; run NO linker design/ensemble/local-FEP (saves ~$250-750 tail). Loss on pilot -> complete the FULL reciprocal cycle (add 3->2 + reciprocal 1/2->3, ~$100-350) = the paper's PRIMARY CAUSAL RESULT (deliverable, not gate overhead), which also aborts the tail if it disconfirms.

milestones.title: RUNG 5b (free): inverse linker design against confirmed basins (basin-fidelity, not atom count)
milestones.cost_est_usd: 0-20 (CPU enumeration/conformer/closure; optional a few Vast-3090 relaxations)
milestones.note: 2026-07-24 restructuring. Derive per-basin linker requirements (endpoint distance, exit-vector dihedral, attachment angles, flexibility, extension, solvent path, surface avoidance, strain, motion tolerance); enumerate a large virtual library; filter by basin fidelity F_{d,k} (conformer closure + strain); keep linkers realizing DISTINCT basins (orientation control, not atom count); annotate exact structures + synthetic feasibility -> ~12-20 virtual constructs (this is where the '24-36' arithmetic now lives - virtual, not a hand-built grid).

milestones.title: RUNG 5c: explicit ternary + full-CRL/E2~Ub ensemble refinement, matched paralogues, constraint-satisfaction
milestones.note: 2026-07-24 restructuring. ~12-20 -> replicated ternary + full CRL/E2~Ub MD across target states/linker conformers/in-basin poses; matched NR4A1/2/3; interface-contact persistence; linker strain; basin retention; SEPARATE accessibility P(B_k|d,s) from stability dG_coop; robust constraint-satisfaction (P_d = P(all constraints hold across scenarios), NOT Pareto-membership alone) -> ~4-8 constructs. EWSR1::NR4A3 fusion context; lysines beyond the LBD.

milestones.title: RUNG 5d (flagship tail): local ternary FEP within retained basins -> final ~6-12 candidates
milestones.note: 2026-07-24 restructuring (replaces ternary_prospective_matrix). Alchemy ONLY within a retained basin (both endpoints plausibly bound, modest congeneric change, acceptable hybrid topology, endpoint stability not restraint-created). NOT for comparing unrelated linkers/ligases/basins. Final set ~6-12 with >=2 mechanistic wedges, >=2 linker architectures, VHL+CRBN only where both survive, explicit negative controls, robust to reciprocal-mutation tests. Deliverable = computationally prioritized, structure-defined, retrosynthetically annotated candidate set WITH an identified causal selectivity mechanism; degradation experimentally UNVALIDATED. LANGUAGE: 'predicted selective candidate'; never imply efficacy/safety/window/clinical-readiness.

milestones.title: OPTIONAL/HELD: dG_open per paralogue (only if we want UNCONDITIONAL affinity)
milestones.note: Mandatory change 2 (preferred path). Converged pocket-opening free energy per paralogue so observable affinity = dG_open + dG_bind|open and per-paralogue penalties enter SELECTIVITY. HELD - only with an explicit nod. If NOT run, report everything conditional on the open state (fully defensible, $0).

milestones.title: OPTIONAL/HELD: conditional ABFE (pose-plausibility) - RAW, no T4L offset
milestones.note: Mandatory change 3. HELD - as framed, not worth running (interpretability). Launch only with an explicit nod if the pose-plausibility question is worth it. Report RAW ABFE as POSE-PLAUSIBILITY (is the hypothesized pose thermodynamically plausible), T4L discrepancy SEPARATELY. Does NOT prove 'binds at all'. Free-cmpd19 ABFE != each degrader's binary affinity.

milestones.title: RUNG 6: fold results into paper (+ SI), apply language discipline, QM/torsion + physchem/retrosynthesis
milestones.note: Single source of truth = nr4a3-degrader-paper.md (+ SI). Apply ALL reviewer language discipline (predicted candidate / conditional bound state / directional concordance; no efficacy/safety/window/clinical claims; cmpd19 MYC induction as liability). Add QM/torsion validation at degrader linker junctions + physicochemical + retrosynthetic assessment of the final matrix. Re-render figures. Fold conditional ABFE (if run) as pose-plausibility only.

shelved._reason: Broad DE NOVO warhead GENERATION stays parked per the ternary-first strategy (denovo_401 is at most a side comparator). ABFE is NOT shelved but is HELD + REFRAMED as a conditional pose-plausibility calc (abfe_conditional) per the 2026-07-15 reviewer verdict. The old transferable-T4L-offset framing and the 'RBFE/ABFE proves it binds at all' framing are RETIRED (reviewer mandatory change 3).
